description: A fresh, marine-sporty fragrance - Pure - from boss by hugo boss, has strong aquatic traces referenced by its drool-worthy ocean blue flask. The cologne contains top notes of fig water, Mediterranean citrus, a heart of lily and hyacinth, and base notes of Massoia wood. Dab some for an evening date or a weekend party at an upscale club.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
